inputs.titre: Invention du téléautographe de Elisha Gray

reason: The image depicts a scene with men in attire appropriate for the late 19th century. The architecture with exposed brick and large windows also matches the era. The presence of a device that appears to be an early form of telegraph is consistent with the supposed subject matter. There are no obvious modern items or fantastical elements. The lighting and interior design are believable for the time period. However, the light bulbs used look like modern incandescent bulbs and not carbon filament bulbs, a slight anachronism. The suits look too modern cut and well-fitted.
